description: Link files and folders between vaults so they share the same content on disk, with per-file exclude rules for things you want to keep vault-specific (e.g. themes). - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: ArmaLv
manifest.description: Link a whole vault, or just specific files/folders, to another vault so they share the same content on disk. Choose one-way or two-way sync per item, and exclude anything you want to keep vault-specific (e.g. themes).
manifest.name: Vault Link

name: Vault Link

releases.author: ArmaLv
releases.description:
**Sync multiple files/folders per link**: you're no longer limited to one path per link; add as many files/folders as you want, all syncing to the same target vault.

**One-way sync option**: set a link (or an individual file/folder) to one-way, so this vault stays the source of truth and edits made only in the target vault are never pulled back in.

`.obsidian` folder is now excluded by default when syncing your whole vault, with a toggle to include it if you actually want to.

**Won't auto-sync until you say so**: a new link waits for your first manual "Sync now" click before it starts syncing automatically, so you have time to set up excludes first.

**Better exclude handling**: pick a file/folder to exclude instead of typing it by hand, and excludes now actually detach files that were already linked before you added them.

**Smarter, less redundant syncing**: overlapping files/folders in the same link no longer get double-handled or conflict with each other.

**UI cleanup**: collapsible sections, clearer spacing, and a "syncing…" notice so it's obvious something's happening on larger syncs.

Various bug fixes and performance improvements to reduce freezing during sync.
